user.title: Add Reachy Mini
user.description: Connect to a Reachy Mini daemon by hostname or IP. The default `reachy-mini.local` works on most LANs with mDNS resolution.

confirm.title: Add discovered Reachy Mini?
confirm.description: Add the Reachy Mini at `{host}` (unit `{unit_id}`) to Home Assistant?

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the daemon. Verify the robot is on the network and the daemon is running.

abort.already_configured: This Reachy Mini is already configured.
abort.no_unit_id: Discovered Reachy Mini is missing the unit_id TXT record. Upgrade the Reachy Mini daemon to a release with Home Assistant support.
